news.title: Google takes a page out of Meta’s book, announces new audio-powered smart glasses
news.summary: Google is calling the new devices "audio glasses," in that users will be able to issue verbal commands to them and get things done via its ecosystem of apps and services, including Gemini.

news.title: Google’s Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
news.summary: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel, allowing users to explore environments, weather changes, and rare scenarios.

news.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
news.summary: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

news.title: How to use Google’s new information agents
news.summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

news.title: Google Search as you know it is over
news.summary: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publishers across the web.

news.title: Kickstarter just killed its new mature content rules
news.summary: Last week, we noted Kickstarter's new content guidelines, which had some pretty weird new additions, including a prohibition on "sexual wellness products that are not designed for insertion or penetration and are not marketed primarily for sexual gratification." Those rules have now been eliminated

news.title: Gemini will use Volvo’s external cameras to interpret parking signs
news.summary: Gemini is gaining the power of sight and mobility. Today at the I/O conference, Google and Volvo announced that the AI-powered assistant will be able to access external cameras in the upcoming EX60 SUV to help explain and interpret its surroundings to vehicle owners. news.title: The 13 biggest announcements at Google I/O 2026
news.summary: Google's I/O 2026 keynote today was once again full of AI-related announcements including a new family of Gemini 3.5 AI models, new features for Search and Gmail, and updates about its Project Aura smart glasses. news.title: Google wants to compete with Anthropic’s Mythos
news.summary: Google is making a big push into cybersecurity. At I/O, the company announced that it was inviting select groups of experts to test the API for CodeMender, an "AI agent for code security" it debuted last October. news.title: Google can now vibe-code you an Android app
news.summary: Google is announcing a major upgrade to one of its vibe coding platforms: Beginning today, you can now use AI Studio to build native Android apps. news.title: RFK Jr. forced to withdraw charter that opened CDC panel to anti-vaccine quacks
news.summary: Charter would have expanded member eligibility and focused on alleged injuries.

news.title: Google announces agent-optimized Gemini 3.5.Flash and a do-anything model called Omni
news.summary: Google says its more efficient Gemini 3.5 Flash is the key to your agentic AI future.

news.title: The era of 1,000 Hz gaming monitors has arrived, but why?
news.summary: LG's latest hits one frame per millisecond at a full 1080p resolution.

news.title: EV drivers will pay $130 a year under Congress' 2026 transportation bill
news.summary: Politicians say they want EVs to pay "their fair share for the use of our roads."

news.title: Civilization VII finally lets you build a civ that stands the test of time
news.summary: Civ 7’s devs talk walking back the game's most controversial decision.

news.title: Meta Employees Are Scrambling to Use Up Benefits Ahead of Layoffs
news.summary: On the eve of about 8,000 jobs being cut, employees are cashing in on headphone stipends and other perks while they still can.

news.title: Google Makes It Easy to Deepfake Yourself
news.summary: Google’s overhaul of its AI creation software, Flow, includes a new video model and a tool for generating selfie videos called avatars.

news.title: Hands-On With All of Google’s New Upcoming Android XR Smart Glasses
news.summary: Here's your first look at smart glasses coming from Warby Parker and Gentle Monster, powered by Google and Samsung's XR platform.

news.title: Demis Hassabis Thinks AI Job Cuts Are Dumb
news.summary: The CEO of Google DeepMind tells WIRED that companies should use the productivity gains of AI to do more, not lay people off.

news.title: Google Search Goes Agentic—and Doesn’t Need You Anymore
news.summary: Vibe-coded results! Super widgets! Bots that never sleep! Google’s vision for the future of Search is hyper-personalized, automated, and extremely AI.
